title: prunus × sibirica
intro: Prunus × sibirica, also known as the Siberian cherry, is a deciduous shrub or small tree native to Russia and Eastern Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which are attributed to its rich content of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Prunus × sibirica include its potential to reduce inflammation and improve cardiovascular health, as well as its ability to act as an antioxidant and protect against cell damage. Prunus × sibirica is often prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, and has also been used in the production of herbal remedies, such as salves and creams, to aid in wound healing and skin care.
